name: Spar SBI Card
exclusions: transactions excluded under Spar SBI Card terms
milestoneBenefits: 1,000 bonus Reward Points on annual spends of Rs 20,000 across Landmark Stores
2,000 bonus Reward Points on annual spends of Rs 45,000 across Landmark Stores
5,000 bonus Reward Points on annual spends of Rs 95,000 across Landmark Stores
8,000 bonus Reward Points on overall annual retail spends of Rs 2 lakh
additionalBenefits: 2,000 bonus Reward Points worth Rs 500 on payment of annual fee
2,000 Reward Points worth Rs 500 on payment of renewal fee
5 Reward Points per Rs 100 at online and retail Landmark Stores including Lifestyle, Home Centre, Max and Spar, plus dining and movies
1 Reward Point per Rs 100 on other eligible non-fuel retail purchases
Reward Points can be redeemed instantly at Lifestyle, Home Centre, Spar and Max stores
1% fuel surcharge waiver on eligible fuel transactions from Rs 500 to Rs 3,000, capped at Rs 100 per statement cycle
